name: Washington L&I Plumbing Contractor License

agency.name: Washington State Department of Labor & Industries

updateFrequency: unknown for the lookup; verify against the official L&I Verify tool before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: This entry is scoped to licensed plumbing contractors and L&I verification metadata.
Individual plumber certificates, local permits, inspections, water-system operator credentials, and non-plumbing construction credentials are outside this source entry.
Plumbing contractors may also need general contractor registration for non-plumbing work, depending on the scope.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate the L&I Verify lookup without a separate access-control, terms, and saved-fixture review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official L&I lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a credential, permit, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official plumbing-contractor-specific bulk download has been adapter-reviewed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Washington L&I plumbing contractor verification. L&I states that a plumbing contractor license is required to advertise, offer, bid, or perform plumbing work.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from individual plumber certification and general contractor registration until source shapes are reviewed.

researchEvidence.note: Official L&I page reviewed; it states that a plumbing contractor license is required to advertise, offer, bid, or perform plumbing work.
Official L&I requirements reviewed; plumbing contractors must designate a certified plumber and may also register as general contractors for non-plumbing work.
Official L&I Verify lookup reviewed as the public verification path for contractors, tradespeople, and businesses.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable plumbing-contractor-specific bulk or saved-fixture browser path has been adapter-reviewed.
